userIntent:
Quando una nota prodotta dalla web wiki deve restare Open Discussion e quando invece deve diventare spec, ADR o task plan? Verifica se SPEC-0005 lo spiega abbastanza bene
  o se serve una proposta di chiarimento

sourceAuthorityHints: Wiki summarizes current knowledge and must not replace authoritative documents.
Specs, ADRs, task plans, code, and project docs own their respective domains.
artifactPolicyHints: The UI event is not a decision.
Durable Markdown changes require reviewed promotion.
